primary_symptoms: Long, elliptical, grayish-green lesions on leaves.
prevention_protocol: Deploy resistant hybrids and optimize row crop spacing for aeration.

primary_symptoms: Diamond-shaped lesions with gray centers and reddish borders.
weather_trigger_condition: Cool temperatures (<25°C) coupled with high relative humidity (>90%).
prevention_protocol: Avoid excessive nitrogen application and maintain uniform field flooding.

primary_symptoms: Tan to black leaf necrosis originating from infected hulls.
weather_trigger_condition: High temperatures (>32°C) combined with late-season over-irrigation.
prevention_protocol: Implement regulated deficit irrigation during the hull-split phase.

primary_symptoms: Brick-red pustules breaking through the epidermis of stems.
weather_trigger_condition: Warm humid days (20-30°C) with continuous overnight dew formation.
prevention_protocol: Apply targeted preventative triazole fungicides at first flag leaf emergence.

primary_symptoms: Water-soaked lesions causing seed rot and seedling collapse.
weather_trigger_condition: Saturated, poorly drained soils with cool ambient temperatures.
prevention_protocol: Ensure premium seed chemical treatment and delay planting until soil warms.
